# Best Ingredients to Look for in Acne Facial Cleansers
By [Cynthia Bailey MD](https://drbaileyskincare.com/pages/meet-dr-cynthia-bailey/)
![best ingredients to have in facial cleanser](https://drbaileyskincare.com/cdn/shop/articles/best_ingredients_in_acne_face_cleansers_1080x.webp?v=1745287643)
What ingredients should you look for in an acne facial cleanser? This is a difficult question that so many people face. The key is to look for acne facial cleansers that contain salicylic acid, glycolic acid or benzoyl peroxide. For people who also have the yeast type of 'fungal' acne called [Pityrosporum folliculitis,](https://drbaileyskincare.com/blogs/blog/pityrosporum-folliculitis-acne-could-this-be-why-your-acne-wont-go-away) I recommend they alternate one of the first three ingredients with a pyrithione zinc cleanser.
### Best Ingredients to Look for in Acne Facial Cleansers
  * [Key ingredients in acne facial cleansers](https://drbaileyskincare.com/blogs/blog/best-ingredients-to-look-for-in-acne-facial-cleansers#anchor1)
  * [What are the benefits/results you can expect from acne treatment cleansers?](https://drbaileyskincare.com/blogs/blog/best-ingredients-to-look-for-in-acne-facial-cleansers#anchor2)
  * [What are the best facial acne cleansers with physician strength ingredients?](https://drbaileyskincare.com/blogs/blog/best-ingredients-to-look-for-in-acne-facial-cleansers#anchor3)
  * [Get a doctor's acne treatment routine in my Ultimate Acne Solutions Kit](https://drbaileyskincare.com/blogs/blog/best-ingredients-to-look-for-in-acne-facial-cleansers#anchor4)
  * [What are the best acne cleansers for back acne?](https://drbaileyskincare.com/blogs/blog/best-ingredients-to-look-for-in-acne-facial-cleansers#anchor5)


## Key ingredients in acne facial cleansers:
  * Salicylic acid
  * Benzoyl peroxide
  * Glycolic acid
  * Pyrithione zinc


### How do the most effective ingredients in acne facial cleansers fight acne?
The first three ingredients penetrate pores, helping to get rid of blackheads. They unblock and unclog pores filled with dead cells, makeup, oil, germs, dirt and debris. To help shrink and refine the appearance of your pores, you want to get rid of clogged pores!
**Benzoyl peroxide** is also the best medicated ingredient for treating the acne-causing bacteria called [P. acnes](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK83685/) (now renamed C. acnes) – in fact, study after study continues to show that benzoyl peroxide is more effective at treating P. acnes than prescription, topical antibiotics!
**Pyrithione zinc** is a great addition for Pityrosporum folliculitis acne care. It also helps target other Pityrosporum yeast-based skin conditions (Pityrosporum yeast is also called [Malassezia](https://www.jaad.org/article/S0190-9622\(03\)03478-9/fulltext)) common to people struggling with acne including facial dandruff (often seen as redness and scale in the crease of the nose), and tinea versicolor. 
**Salicylic acid** is a medicine with an affinity to penetrate oil and helps to [clean oily pores](https://drbaileyskincare.com/pages/salicylic-acid) and dissolve blackheads so that other ingredients, such as benzoyl peroxide, can penetrate better.
**Glycolic acid** is an [AHA](https://drbaileyskincare.com/pages/glycolic-acid) that helps lighten skin hyperpigmentation from old acne lesions and acne scars. It’s also a great ingredient to brighten the complexion for a smoother and more flawless appearance to your skin. 
## What are the benefits/results you can expect from acne treatment cleansers?
Acne cleansers with these ingredients will gradually unclog pores, reduce the size of existing blackheads and slow or stop the formation of new ones. Benzoyl peroxide and pyrithione zinc also fight germs that cause red acne pimples and pustules.
### Why is it important to wash your face if you have acne-prone skin?
![best acne cleanser ingredients](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0257/8454/9428/files/girl_washing_face_0c467a3f-3067-4194-9d54-86cb1e20e797_240x240.jpg?v=1600819138)
As a dermatologist, I want everyone with acne to know that there are 3 really important reasons to wash your face when you have acne prone skin:
  1. It’s a simple and convenient way to deliver the treating ingredients in your cleanser to your facial skin.
  2. It allows the ingredients to be placed onto clean skin and penetrate into pores where they are needed.
  3. It’s important to remove products, pore clogging dead cells, oil and bacteria accumulated during the day. These all can worsen acne.


Acne treatment starts with the use of an acne cleanser twice a day, morning and night.  

### How do you wash your acne prone skin with acne cleansers to get the best results?
Wet your face with warm water first, then lather your cleanser over all of your facial skin. Depending on your skin type, you can use:
  1. your fingers (recommended for extremely sensitive skin),
  2. an [facial exfoliating sponge](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/buf-puf-gentle-exfoliating-facial-sponge "Buf Puf Sponge"), or
  3. a sonic skin cleansing brush system such as the Foreo.


Then rinse well with warm water to entirely remove the lather. Know that acne cleansers are designed so that the important acne cleanser ingredients will stay behind, but the cleanser’s foaming agents as well as built-up oil, dead cells, old product and bacteria will be rinsed off of your skin.
### What should you put on your acne prone skin after using an acne cleanser? [](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/naturally-hydrating-pore-minimizing-facial-toner)
[![pore shrinking toner to use after acne cleanser](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0257/8454/9428/files/24-naturally-hydrating-pore-minimizing-facial-toner_480x480.jpg?v=1727989911)](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/naturally-hydrating-pore-minimizing-facial-toner "naturally hydrating pore minimizing toner")
Using a [skin toner](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/naturally-hydrating-pore-minimizing-facial-toner) or astringent is an excellent additional step in acne skin cleansing. The toner or astringent will remove more oils and deliver additional beneficial ingredients. My preferred skin toner ingredient is [witch hazel.](https://drbaileyskincare.com/pages/witch-hazel) I crafted my [**Naturally Hydrating Pore Minimizing Toner** ](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/naturally-hydrating-pore-minimizing-facial-toner "Naturally hydrating pore minimizing toner")with organic witch hazel. This natural astringent helps to tighten pore openings to refine the pore appearance. 
I typically have my acne patients apply their other topical products on top of their toner such as their prescription medicines, an oil free moisturizer and sunscreen. Don't be tempted to forget these last two products because they will help to keep your acne prone complexion healthy.
### Why do dermatologists recommend that people with acne use a facial moisturizer and sunscreen every day?
  * Moisturizer keeps acne prone skin hydration balanced to prevent it from becoming dry and irritated.
  * Sunscreen helps prevent brown marks and hyperpigmented acne scars. 


Be sure to pick a moisturizer and sunscreen that is oil free and made without pore-clogging ingredients. Acne patients have used my [**Daily Moisturizing Face Cream** ](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/daily-moisturizing-face-cream)for years and put it to the test. It is the perfect moisturizer for acne prone complexions.
My[**Sheer Strength Pure Physical Matte Tinted SPF 50+ Sunscreen**](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/sheer-strength-pure-physical-sunscreen) is the ideal sunscreen to hide complexion flaws while providing powerful broad spectrum UV protection. The subtle tinting blends into all skin tones and the matte base helps absorb oil throughout the day. 
[![best facial moisturizer and sunscreen for acne prone skin](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0257/8454/9428/files/Fort_Knox_For_Your_Face_Kit_480x480.webp?v=1667960012)](https://drbaileyskincare.com/products/hydrate-protect-kit)
